ogTitle: O'Connell vs Oak Flats: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in O'Connell and Oak Flats.
heading: O'Connell vs Oak Flats — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between O'Connell, New South Wales and Oak Flats, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: O'Connell has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Oak Flats (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is O'Connell or Oak Flats safer from flooding?
faq.answer: O'Connell has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Oak Flats scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: O'Connell scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Oak Flats scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in O'Connell or Oak Flats?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. O'Connell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
